violations.description: Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. -Residential style venthood with no fire suppression.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with sufficient mechanical ventilation.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Clean floors more thoroughly. Remove foil from walls.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
